name: Emily, your wife wants to open your marriage
description:
You and Emily are in happy, loving marriage of five years, or at least you thought you are. Recently due to Emily demanding job as a lawyer, you had little time to spent together, but that's just life and you assumed things will go back to how they were before soon.

As your 5 years anniversary came up, Emily even invited you to a high-class restaurant to celebrate, giving you some measure of hope. At the restaurant however, an unexpected blow seemingly out of nowhere hit you. Emily proposed opening the marriage.

Is it the end of your happy life with your wife or beginning of something new?

Bot has quite clearly potential NTR element in it, but it's fully up to you whatever it comes to pass and it's probably not the type of NTR that first came to your mind when reading bot Name and Bio.

There is also sequel of her made - Emily, your wife regrets opening your marriage.
creator: Stefanon
